--- title: File formats jupyter: python3 execute: eval: true --- ::: {#e6c4b2a3 .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import os import sys import requests, zipfile, io from time import perf_counter ``` ::: ::: {#0ad6c289 .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} from pyspark import SparkConf, SparkContext from pyspark.sql import SparkSession ``` ::: ::: {#c1a02917 .cell execution_count=3} ``` {.python .cell-code} from pyspark.sql import Window import pyspark.sql.functions as func from pyspark.sql.types import * from pyspark.sql.functions import col, lit import pyspark ``` ::: ::: {#37731261 .cell execution_count=4} ``` {.python .cell-code} from functools import reduce import numpy as np from scipy.sparse import csr_matrix import json ``` ::: ::: {#58d1acf4 .cell execution_count=5} ``` {.python .cell-code} import pyarrow import pyarrow.parquet as pq ``` ::: ::: {#f87db4bb .cell execution_count=6} ``` {.python .cell-code} import pandas as pd ``` ::: # Launching Spark session ::: {#06825162 .cell execution_count=7} ``` {.python .cell-code} spark = ( SparkSession.builder .master("local[*]") .appName("Playing with file formats") .config("spark.driver.memory", "16G") .config("spark.driver.maxResultSize", "0") .getOrCreate() ) ``` ::: ::: {#e884e319 .cell execution_count=8} ``` {.python .cell-code} sc = spark._sc ``` ::: # Locating files ::: {#5be58d66 .cell execution_count=9} ``` {.python .cell-code} deajson_path = './data/drug-enforcement.json' ``` ::: ::: {#37f90656 .cell execution_count=10} ``` {.python .cell-code} wbd_path = './data/webdata.parquet' ``` ::: ::: {#5f497070 .cell execution_count=11} ``` {.python .cell-code} if not os.path.exists(path): url = "https://s-v-b.github.io/IFEBY310/data/webdata.parquet.zip" r = requests.get(url) z = zipfile.ZipFile(io.BytesIO(r.content)) z.extractall(path='./data/') ``` ::: ::: {#6da8bab4 .cell execution_count=12} ``` {.python .cell-code} file_path = 'file://' + os.path.abspath(wbd_path) df = spark.read.parquet(file_path) ``` ::: # Comparing footprints on hard drive ## CSV versus parquet ::: {#246d59e3 .cell execution_count=13} ``` {.python .cell-code} # %% path_to_parquet = 'file://' + os.path.abspath(wbd_path) path_to_csv = path_to_parquet.replace('parquet', 'csv') df.write.csv(path_to_csv, mode="overwrite") ``` ::: ::: {#a69fa9a7 .cell execution_count=14} ``` {.python .cell-code} !du -s ./data/webdata* ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` 163516 ./data/webdata.csv 27916 ./data/webdata.orc 38280 ./data/webdata.parquet 4 ./data/webdata_schema.json 42832 ./data/webdata-transformed.parquet ``` ::: ::: ::: {#0e249019 .cell execution_count=15} ``` {.python .cell-code} df_csv = spark.read.csv(path_to_csv) df_csv.printSchema() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` root |-- _c0: string (nullable = true) |-- _c1: string (nullable = true) |-- _c2: string (nullable = true) |-- _c3: string (nullable = true) |-- _c4: string (nullable = true) |-- _c5: string (nullable = true) |-- _c6: string (nullable = true) |-- _c7: string (nullable = true) ``` ::: ::: CSV is not self-documented! The schema has to saved somewhere and then reloaded. `StructType` has a `json()` method, that encodes ::: {#2dbdf049 .cell execution_count=16} ``` {.python .cell-code} webdata_schema = df.schema # StructType() # %% with open('./data/webdata_schema.json', 'w') as fp: fp.write(webdata_schema.json()) # Saved ``` ::: ::: {#ecc9dbd0 .cell execution_count=17} ``` {.python .cell-code} # %% with open('./data/webdata_schema.json', 'r') as fp: schema_str = json.load(fp) # Reloaded tentative_schema = StructType.fromJson(schema_str) ``` ::: ::: {#67335639 .cell execution_count=18} ``` {.python .cell-code} ( spark .read .schema(tentative_schema) .csv(path_to_csv) .printSchema() ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` root |-- xid: string (nullable = true) |-- action: string (nullable = true) |-- date: timestamp (nullable = true) |-- website_id: string (nullable = true) |-- url: string (nullable = true) |-- category_id: float (nullable = true) |-- zipcode: string (nullable = true) |-- device: string (nullable = true) ``` ::: ::: ## Parquet versus ORC ::: {#20786861 .cell execution_count=19} ``` {.python .cell-code} path_to_orc = 'file://' + os.path.abspath(wbd_path.replace('parquet', 'orc')) df.write.orc(path_to_orc, mode="overwrite") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` [Stage 1146:===========================> (6 + 6) / 12] ``` ::: ::: ::: {#3a63961d .cell execution_count=20} ``` {.python .cell-code} !du -s ./data/webdata* ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` 163516 ./data/webdata.csv 27916 ./data/webdata.orc 38280 ./data/webdata.parquet 4 ./data/webdata_schema.json 42832 ./data/webdata-transformed.parquet ``` ::: ::: ::: {#35ff216f .cell execution_count=21} ``` {.python .cell-code} ( spark .read .orc(path_to_orc) .printSchema() ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` root |-- xid: string (nullable = true) |-- action: string (nullable = true) |-- date: timestamp (nullable = true) |-- ``` 4 ``` ::: ::: ::: {#94a22ad3 .cell execution_count=26} ``` {.python .cell-code} # %%timeit ( spark .read .parquet(path_to_parquet) .select('action', 'category_id') .distinct() .count() ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=126} ``` 4 ``` ::: ::: ::: {#d59334d6 .cell execution_count=27} ``` {.python .cell-code} # %%timeit ( spark .read .orc(path_to_orc) .select('action', 'category_id') .distinct() .count() ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=127} ``` 4 ``` ::: ::: # Schema evolution with Parquet ## From the doc ::: {#merged-schema .cell execution_count=28} ``` {.python .cell-code} from pyspark.sql import Row # spark is from the previous example. # Create a simple DataFrame, stored into a partition directory sc = spark.sparkContext squaresDF = spark.createDataFrame(sc.parallelize(range(1, 6)) .map(lambda i: Row(single=i, double=i ** 2))) squaresDF.write.parquet("data/test_table/key=1", mode="overwrite") # Create another DataFrame in a new partition directory, # adding a new column and dropping an existing column cubesDF = spark.createDataFrame(sc.parallelize(range(6, 11)) .map(lambda i: Row(single=i, triple=i ** 3))) cubesDF.write.parquet("data/test_table/key=2", mode="overwrite") # Read the partitioned table mergedDF = ( spark .read .option("mergeSchema", "true") .parquet("data/test_table") ) mergedDF.printSchema() # The final schema consists of all 3 columns in the Parquet files together # with the partitioning column appeared in the partition directory paths. # root # |-- double: long (nullable = true) # |-- single: long (nullable = true) # |-- triple: long (nullable = true) # |-- key: integer (nullable = true) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` root |-- single: long (nullable = true) |-- double: long (nullable = true) |-- triple: long (nullable = true) |-- key: integer (nullable = true) ``` ::: ::: ::: {#9e3405c9 .cell execution_count=29} ``` {.python .cell-code} mergedDF.show() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` +------+------+------+---+ |single|double|triple|key| +------+------+------+---+ | 6| NULL| 216| 2| | 9| NULL| 729| 2| | 7| NULL| 343| 2| | 3| 9| NULL| 1| | 1| 1| NULL| 1| | 5| 25| NULL| 1| | 2| 4| NULL| 1| | 4| 16| NULL| 1| | 8| NULL| 512| 2| | 10| NULL| 1000| 2| +------+------+------+---+ ``` ::: ::: # Handling metadata and schema We will inspect the metadata and schema of our parquet files using `pyarrow.parquet`. ::: {#read-metadata .cell execution_count=30} ``` {.python .cell-code} file_path = os.path.abspath(wbd_path) + '/part-r-00000-eb39f2b4-98d4-4561-814f-b2339e12bc74.snappy.parquet' metadata = pq.read_metadata(file_path) schema = pq.read_schema(file_path) ``` ::: ::: {#94d4ef0f .cell execution_count=31} ``` {.python .cell-code} print(metadata.num_rows) print(metadata.num_row_groups) print(metadata.schema) # print(metadata.key_value_metadata) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` 222763 1 required group field_id=-1 spark_schema { optional binary field_id=-1 xid (String); optional binary field_id=-1 action (String); optional int96 field_id=-1 date; optional binary field_id=-1 website_id (String); optional binary field_id=-1 url (String); optional float field_id=-1 category_id; optional binary field_id=-1 zipcode (String); optional binary field_id=-1 device (String); } ``` ::: ::: ::: {#3ed2b166 .cell execution_count=32} ``` {.python .cell-code} pf = pq.ParquetFile(file_path) pf.schema # Arrow schema ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=132} ``` required group category_id: [[1204,1204,1204,1002,1002,...,1002,1204,1204,1002,1002]] zipcode: [["59500","59500","59500","59500","59500",...,"40280","38960","91150","92100","93800"]] device: [["DSK","DSK","DSK","DSK","DSK",...,"DSK","DSK","DSK","DSK","SMP"]] ``` ::: ::: ::: {#7bc6d665 .cell execution_count=36} ``` {.python .cell-code} dir_path_pq = os.path.abspath(wbd_path) fnames = [fname for fname in os.listdir(dir_path_pq) if fname.endswith('parquet')] metadatas = [pq.read_metadata(dir_path_pq + '/' + fname) for fname in fnames] ``` ::: ::: {#7d0c4725 .cell execution_count=37} ``` {.python .cell-code} def metadata_to_dict(md, include_row_groups=False): d = { "created_by": getattr(md, "created_by", None), "format_version": getattr(md, "format_version", None), "num_columns": md.num_columns, "num_row_groups": md.num_row_groups, "num_rows": md.num_rows, "serialized_size": md.serialized_size, "schema": str(md.schema), "metadata": {k.decode("utf-8", errors="replace"): v.decode("utf-8", errors="replace") for k, v in (md.metadata or {}).items()}, } if include_row_groups: d["row_groups"] = [ {"num_rows": md.row_group(i).num_rows} for i in range(md.num_row_groups) ] return d ``` ::: ::: {#bd52ff4e .cell execution_count=38} ``` {.python .cell-code} # Use it: pd.DataFrame([metadata_to_dict(it, include_row_groups=True) for it in metadatas]) ``` ::: {.cell-output
